# Built a free passport photo tool because I got charged 15 at a photo studio for a JPEG

Needed to renew my passport and went to a photo studio. They took one picture, cropped it, and charged me 15 for something that took 30 seconds...

## Install
```bash
python3 -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate
```

## Usage
```bash
python3 main.py
```

### Expected output
```text
Command completes without runtime errors.
Build status is reported as: SUCCESS.
```

## What this project currently does
- Implement the thinnest useful end-to-end solution in one night build window
- Prefer a runnable CLI or local web app
- Include setup + run instructions in README
